blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add validation for pass/fail determination across all equipment types
Verify that pass/fail determination is applied to all required checkpoints for various equipment types.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pass/fail determination per item, which is explicitly stated in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided only confirms the pass/fail status for the forklift #FL-042 and does not demonstrate that this determination is consistently applied across all required checkpoints or equipment types. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as there is no evidence of pass/fail determination for other equipment types or checkpoints beyond the specific scenario presented.
gaps: No evidence of pass/fail determination for all required checkpoints across different equipment types.
